key.name: unify-volume
key.summary: Set system volume to 100% and control volume exclusively through DDC.

key.name: saved-system-volume
key.summary: System volume saved when unify-volume is enabled. Restored when unify-volume is disabled. -1.0 means no value is saved.

key.name: monitor-volume-available
key.summary: Written by the extension after DDC detection. True if monitor volume was found.

key.name: ddcutil-retries
key.summary: How many times to call `ddcutil' to find monitors, to improve unreliable DDC.

key.name: ddcutil-path
key.summary: Path to the ddcutil binary. Falls back to searching $PATH if empty.

key.name: ddcutil-extra-args
key.summary: Additional arguments passed to every ddcutil invocation.

key.name: ddcutil-sleep-multiplier
key.summary: Multiplier for DDC sleep intervals. ddcutil 2.x uses dynamic sleep by default, so 0.5 is a good starting point. Increase if commands time out.

key.name: keyboard-step
key.summary: Step size (percent) for brightness/volume keyboard shortcuts.
